facts_disclosed: Never spends on himself — everything for family

turns.content: do you think its weird to not own more than like 3 shirts

Not weird at all. Plenty of people keep a minimal wardrobe on purpose — there's a whole movement around it. Some of the most successful people wear the same thing every day to cut down on decision fatigue. What's got you thinking about it?
nah one of my riders today saw me two days in a row and was like bro you wearing the same thing. and im like yeah? lol
Ha, that's awkward of them honestly. Unless your clothes are dirty or smell bad, who cares? Most people have way more clothes than they need anyway.
exactly bro. i literally rotate 3 shirts and 2 pants. thats it. hasnt bothered me in years. i got bigger things to worry about than clothes
If it works for you, it works. Saves money and closet space. Sounds like your priorities are just elsewhere — nothing wrong with that at all.
wallahi bro i dont spend on myself period. like every dollar i make goes to my son or my mom or rent. thats it. thats the whole budget
That's a lot of weight to carry. Taking care of your kid and your mom is admirable, but do you ever feel like you're running on empty? Even small stuff for yourself can help you recharge.
nah i dont see it like that. like what am i gonna buy? new shoes? a watch? thats not what life is about bro. my son eats good my mom is taken care of. im good
I hear you. And honestly, that kind of clarity about what matters is rare. A lot of people spend their whole life chasing stuff that doesn't mean anything. You've got your priorities locked in.
when you come from nothing bro you learn real fast what matters and what doesnt. material stuff is noise

That's a perspective a lot of people never arrive at, even with everything handed to them. Your son and your mom are lucky to have someone who thinks like that. Just make sure you're not running yourself into the ground — you can't pour from an empty cup.
nah bro im not running on empty trust me. like i eat i sleep i got a roof. thats more than a lot of people get. if anything i feel rich compared to where i started
That's a powerful way to look at it. Gratitude like that keeps you grounded. A lot of people with ten times more still feel like they don't have enough.
exactly. and one day inshallah when things are better ill treat myself but right now the mission is clear. family first everything else can wait
Respect. That discipline is going to pay off down the line. When the time comes you'll appreciate it that much more because you earned it.
inshallah bro. anyway i gotta bounce got a ride coming in. appreciate you not making me feel weird about the shirts thing lol
Go get it, man. And for what it's worth — that rider can keep their fashion commentary. You're out here taking care of business. Nothing weird about that.
